abonnement.title: Subscription & payment
abonnement.subtitle: Choose a payment method to activate or renew your license.
abonnement.securityText: We will never ask you for your secret code or password.
abonnement.noMethods: No payment method is enabled at the moment. Please contact support.
abonnement.selectPlanFirst: Select a plan at the top of the page before continuing.
abonnement.proofLabel: Proof of payment (image or PDF, max 5 MB)

msg.orderCreatedGateway: Order {ref} created. Redirection to the gateway pending activation.
msg.voucherOk: Code validated: your license has been activated.
msg.referenceSaved: Reference saved (order {ref}). Awaiting validation by our team.
msg.proofSent: Proof sent (order {ref}). Awaiting validation by our team.
msg.orderRegistered: Order {ref} registered. Payment will be collected on delivery.
